title: centaurium minimum
intro: Centaurium minimum, also known as small gentian or common centaury, is a perennial plant species in the gentian family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurium minimum include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Centaurium minimum can be prepared for consumption through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the recommended dosage typically ranging from 1 to 2 grams of dried plant material per day.
